name: Bounty Hunters Guild
note: Primary combat faction. Cert missions are one-time. Stack 8+ contracts per session.

name: Foxwell Enforcement
note: Event faction — Priority tab missions always available. Yellow → Orange → Red tier. Best BP source in game.

ranks.name: Recruit
ranks.unlocks: Yellow level contracts · Antium armor BPs · Parallax rifle BPs

ranks.name: Operative
ranks.unlocks: Orange level contracts · Glacier/Blizzard cooler BPs · Parallax variant BPs

ranks.name: Agent
ranks.unlocks: Red level contracts · Avalanche cooler BP · FR-86 shield BP

ranks.name: Senior Agent
ranks.unlocks: All Foxwell contracts · Full BP pool access

ranks.name: Specialist
ranks.unlocks: Top Foxwell tier · Max aUEC scaling

name: Covalex Shipping
note: Hauling chain. Run Courier + Hauling tracks simultaneously. Master rank = VK-00/XL-1/Palisade BPs.

ranks.name: Master
ranks.unlocks: ★ VK-00 QD · XL-1 QD · TS-2 QD · Siren · Yeager · Balandin · Palisade · Rampart · Parapet shields · ~260k–313k aUEC · 4000–8000 XP/run

name: InterSec
note: Nyx-based combat faction. Regular patrols drop Testudo armor BPs. TSG = group content for JS-300/JS-400.

ranks.name: Prospect
ranks.unlocks: Intro patrol missions · Testudo Combustion/Earthshake BPs · Pulse pistol BPs

ranks.name: Associate
ranks.unlocks: Regular patrols · Testudo Nightveil/Turfwar BPs · Quartz SMG BPs

ranks.name: Operative
ranks.unlocks: Hard patrols · Full Testudo set BPs · Quartz Deadfall/Lumen BPs

ranks.name: Senior
ranks.unlocks: ERT patrols · Tactical Strike Groups available

ranks.name: Chief
ranks.unlocks: ★ TSG: JS-300 · JS-400 power plant BPs · QuadraCell MX BP · Omnisky cannon BPs · Novian crossbow BPs

name: Headhunters
note: Unlawful Pyro faction. Cave elimination missions. Atzkav sniper + cooler BPs at all tiers.

ranks.name: Introductory
ranks.unlocks: Cave elimination missions · Atzkav sniper BPs · Calico armor BPs · SnowBlind/VaporBlock cooler BPs

ranks.name: Low
ranks.unlocks: More cave variants · Cryo-Star/Winter-Star/Frost-Star cooler BPs · Defiant power plant BP

ranks.name: Medium
ranks.unlocks: Ship bounties · ArcticStorm/BlastChill cooler BPs · DuraJet/Lotus power plant BPs

ranks.name: High
ranks.unlocks: Hard patrols · Full cooler BP set · SparkJet/TigerLilly/ZapJet power plant BPs

ranks.name: Very High
ranks.unlocks: Top tier · All Headhunters BPs available

name: Eckhart Security
note: Stanton assassination/elimination. 7 one-time Arlington gang missions first. Stealth shield BPs at all ranks.

ranks.name: Recruit (R0)
ranks.unlocks: Arlington gang chain (7 one-time missions) · Shimmer/Obscura/SonicLite BPs

ranks.name: Senior (R3)
ranks.unlocks: Very Hard · Full Eckhart stealth shield set · Slipstream BP

ranks.name: Commander (R4)
ranks.unlocks: ERT elimination · All Eckhart BPs · Max aUEC scaling

name: Shubin Interstellar
note: Mining faction. Claimjumper missions — FPS/ship combat at mining sites. All missions drop Strata armor + Arclight pistol BPs (~17%).

ranks.name: Newcomer
ranks.unlocks: Intro claimjumper · Strata Arms/Core/Legs/Helmet + Arclight "Midnight" Pistol BPs (~17% each) · ~5k–10k aUEC

ranks.name: Prospector
ranks.unlocks: All Shubin missions · ~15k–20k aUEC · Same BP pool

ranks.name: Senior
ranks.unlocks: Harder variants · Same BP pool · Higher aUEC

ranks.name: Master
ranks.unlocks: Max standing · Helix Mining Laser BP (if available)

name: Ling Family Hauling
note: Small hauling faction. Run alongside Covalex. Zephyr/Spectre stealth QD BPs + Citadel/Barbican shield BPs unlock early.

ranks.name: New Contractor
ranks.unlocks: Intro delivery · ★ Zephyr/Spectre/Spicule/Bolt stealth QD BPs · Citadel/Barbican/Guardian shield BPs · 100 XP · ~5k aUEC

name: Citizens For Prosperity
note: Pyro faction. Recover Cargo missions drop guaranteed ORC/C54/S71/Artimex BPs. Security patrols are best CFP XP.

ranks.name: Sympathiser
ranks.unlocks: Intro defend/delivery missions · Karna Rifle + Artimex armor BPs (~17%) · ~3k–10k aUEC

ranks.name: Supporter
ranks.unlocks: Recover Cargo missions (guaranteed ORC-mkV/C54/S71 BPs) · Security patrols · ~37k–80k aUEC

ranks.name: Ally
ranks.unlocks: Hard security patrols · Xenothreat missions · ADP/FS-9 BPs · ~80k–150k aUEC

name: Ruto
note: Unlawful Stanton faction. Drug/contraband missions. Good early aUEC, CrimeStat risk. No BP drops confirmed.

name: Adagio Holdings
note: Best aUEC/hr in 4.8 at Senior Contractor rank. RAFT or C2 required for Titanium salvage runs.

ranks.name: Senior Contractor
ranks.unlocks: ★ Adagio Titanium cargo runs — 3M+ aUEC/hr (RAFT/C2 required)
